title: DungeonEscape
description: FPS puzzle game on UE5, built while following a course. C++ mechanics: inventory system, sweep trace interaction, Mover and TriggerComponent for locks and pressure plates.

title: ShooterSam
description: Third-person shooter on UE5, built while following a course. AI focus: Behavior Tree, Blackboard, custom BT Services and Tasks, hitscan with line trace and HUD health system.

title: BattleBlaster
description: Top-down tank shooter on UE5, built while following an introductory course. C++ basics: class inheritance, Enhanced Input System, damage system, timers, Material Instances and UMG UI.

title: DailyObjectives
description: Desktop app built independently in Java with Swing. Manages daily objectives organized by date, with historical archive, file persistence and a custom dark-themed GUI.
